message:
test(approval): add pure function and edge case tests (bd-1u5g)

Coverage improved from 69.1% to 76.6%. Added tests for buildSLBCommand,
parseSLBRequestID, contains, generateApprovalID, DefaultConfig,
NewEngine default expiry, deny-already-approved, approve-nonexistent,
and request-with-nil-context.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-3gq8i","title":"Task: Optional MS skill injection into ContextPack","description":"## Overview
Optionally include top MS skills in the recovery/context pack for spawned agents.

## Behavior
- Config flag: `context.ms_skills = true` (default false)
- Include top N skills with IDs
- Respect token budget

## Acceptance Criteria
- Disabled by default
- Included only when MS available
- Clear source attribution in prompt","notes":"## Testing Requirements
- Unit tests: core logic, error paths, edge cases.
- E2E scripts: full CLI/robot flow with detailed log/slog prefixes (e.g., [E2E-<AREA>]) and include session/agent/bead IDs.
- If structured outputs are affected, assert schema stability + deterministic ordering.
","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T19:01:13.498147762Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T19:48:47.870050702Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3gq8i","depends_on_id":"bd-jiuvm","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3h0n","title":"Task: Create timeline panel widget for dashboard","description":"## Overview
Implement the visual timeline panel that renders agent activity as horizontal bars.

## Deliverables
1. Create internal/tui/dashboard/panels/timeline.go:
   - TimelinePanel struct implementing Panel interface
   - Horizontal bars per agent showing state over time
   - Color coding: Idle=gray, Working=green, Waiting=yellow, Error=red
   - Time axis at bottom with tick marks

2. Rendering logic:
   - Calculate pixels per time unit based on panel width
   - Render each agent as a horizontal track
   - Fill bars with state colors for each time period
   - Add labels for agent names on left

3. Visual design:
   Agent-1: [████░░░████████░░███████░░░░░░████]
   Agent-2: [░░░░████████░░░░░░░░████████░░░░░░]
   Agent-3: [████████████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░███████]
            |-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|-----|
            10:00 10:15 10:30 10:45 11:00 11:15

4. Panel controls:
   - Zoom in/out with +/- keys
   - Scroll left/right with arrow keys
   - Jump to now with 'n' key
   - Show event details on hover/select

## Implementation Notes
- Use lipgloss for colored block rendering
- Efficient rendering (only render visible time window)
- Support variable panel width

## Acceptance Criteria
- Timeline renders correctly in dashboard
- Colors match state semantics
- Zoom and scroll work smoothly
- Panel adapts to width changes
- Unit tests for rendering logic","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T18:27:50.199826149Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-20T03:52:03.473303629Z","closed_at":"2026-01-20T03:52:03.473236923Z","close_reason":"Timeline panel implemented: TimelinePanel struct with horizontal bars per agent, color coding (Working=green, Waiting=yellow, Error=red, Idle=gray), time axis with tick marks, zoom (+/-), scroll (arrows), jump to now (n), details (enter). 14 unit tests pass. Visual design matches spec.","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3h0n","depends_on_id":"bd-2t7n","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3h0n","depends_on_id":"bd-f815","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"}]}

## Test Coverage

### Mode Visualization Tests
- Render includes mode code + tier chip (CORE/ADV/EXP)

- Phase transitions (waiting/collecting/synthesizing/complete)

- Responsive layout

 {"id":"bd-3h8q","title":"E2E Tests: YAML config driven swarm startup","description":"## Test Coverage
E2E test of starting swarm from YAML config file.

## Test Scenario
1. Create swarm.yaml with full config
2. Run ntm swarm --config=swarm.yaml
3. Verify agents match config
4. Verify prompts match config
5. Verify assignment settings applied

## Test Config (test_swarm.yaml)
```yaml
session: e2e-config-test
agents:
  claude: 2
  codex: 1
options:
  no-user: true
prompts:
  init: "Test initialization prompt"
assignment:
  source: bv
  limit: 3
```

## Verification
- Session name matches config
- Agent count matches config
- Init prompt sent to all agents
- Assignment limit respected

## Test File
tests/e2e/test_config_spawn.sh","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T18:22:08.412348047Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-19T19:09:17.668998085Z","closed_at":"2026-01-19T19:09:17.668948051Z","close_reason":"Dropped per canonical assign flow; redundant/overlapping entry points","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3h8q","depends_on_id":"bd-n770","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3hdd4","title":"Task: Implement synthesis progress indicator component","description":"Implement synthesis progress indicator component for ensemble TUI.

## UI States
- Waiting: show ready/pending counts, start button disabled
- Collecting: progress bar %, per-window status lines with mode code + tier + token counts
- Synthesizing: show strategy, synthesizer mode, input token count, progress bar
- Complete: show success badge and link to results output

## Implementation
- File: internal/tui/synthesis_progress.go
- Types: SynthesisProgress, SynthesisPhase (Waiting/Collecting/Synthesizing/Complete)
- Methods: Init, Update, View
- Include tier chips in per-window lines (CORE/ADV/EXP)

## Dependencies
- Bubble Tea framework
- Collector status (bd-1av7i)
- Mode catalog for code/tier display (bd-3806s)

## Logging Requirements
- Log phase transitions in debug mode
- Log total token counts and percent progress","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-23T10:32:29.909968701Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-26T03:01:35.148225421Z","closed_at":"2026-01-26T03:01:35.147888807Z","close_reason":"Implemented synthesis progress component + tests","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3hdd4","depends_on_id":"bd-1av7i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3hdd4","depends_on_id":"bd-3806s","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3hdd4","depends_on_id":"bd-rylze","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"}]}
